description:
This quiz tests foundational SQL query skills, including syntax, data retrieval, and basic database operations, with a beginner to intermediate difficulty level. It uses a casual, engaging tone to challenge developers who may rely on ORMs, encouraging them to strengthen their raw SQL proficiency.
Topics: SQL syntax, Data retrieval, Joins, Filtering and sorting, Basic database operations
Audience: Developers using ORMs who need to reinforce their core SQL knowledge
